description: User changes employer across sessions — current fact must win, stale one must not appear.

messages.content: I work at Stripe as a backend engineer on the payments team. Been there about three years.
Today's been rough — Stripe had an incident in eu-west-1 and I was on call.
Big news — I just left Stripe and started at Notion last Monday. Switching to a PM role too.

probes.query: Where does the user currently work?
What is the user's current role?
Tell me about the user's career history.
